name: ExtensionImplementationGuide_Definition_Resource_FhirVersion
title: R5: fhirVersion
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ImplementationGuide.definition.resource.fhirVersion` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ImplementationGuide.definition.resource.fhirVersion` 0..* `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ImplementationGuide.definition.resource.fhirVersion` 0..* `code`
*  R4B: `ImplementationGuide.definition.resource.fhirVersion` 0..* `code`
*  R4: `ImplementationGuide.definition.resource.fhirVersion` 0..* `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ImplementationGuide.definition.resource.fhirVersion` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImplementationGuide.definition.resource.fhirVersion` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.comment:
Element `ImplementationGuide.definition.resource.fhirVersion` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ImplementationGuide.definition.resource.fhirVersion` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.
The resource SHALL be valid against all the versions it is specified to apply to. If the resource referred to is a StructureDefinition, the fhirVersion stated in the StructureDefinition cannot disagree with the version specified here; the specified versions SHALL include the version specified by the StructureDefinition, and may include additional versions using the [http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-applicable-version](http://hl7.org/fhir/extensions/StructureDefinition-structuredefinition-applicable-version.html) extension.

element.short: Versions this applies to (if different to IG)
element.definition: Indicates the FHIR Version(s) this artifact is intended to apply to. If no versions are specified, the resource is assumed to apply to all the versions stated in ImplementationGuide.fhirVersion.
element.comment: The resource SHALL be valid against all the versions it is specified to apply to. If the resource referred to is a StructureDefinition, the fhirVersion stated in the StructureDefinition cannot disagree with the version specified here; the specified versions SHALL include the version specified by the StructureDefinition, and may include additional versions using the [http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/structuredefinition-applicable-version](http://hl7.org/fhir/extensions/StructureDefinition-structuredefinition-applicable-version.html) extension.
